subject: Implement Draw Inference Analytics Changes
description:
Per ticket-inference-analytics.md:
1. Format label bbox atas: {ID}-{ClassName} ({ConfInt%})
2. Format label bbox bawah (Truck HD only): {seconds} second ({area}%)
3. Clamp ID to 2 digits (0-99)
4. Reduce font size, ensure text ≤ bbox width
5. CK: move Total Monitor/Violation to bottom, 75% font, no gap
6. Number formatting: trim trailing zeros
